violations.text: Ice and coffee grounds were observed in the hand-washing sink in the front counter area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Proper use of hand-washing sink discussed with the PIC at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

The following food items were observed improperly cold held at the time of inspection... - Food items in the sandwich prep unit were observed at 44-45 degrees Fahrenheit. Per the PIC, food items were recently stocked prior to inspection (unit observed to be overstocked). Food item portions were reduced and moved to colder refrigeration at the time of inspection. - Hash browns (tater tots) were observed held on top of the oven at 68 degrees Fahrenheit. Per the PIC, tater tots are cooked and held out of refrigeration for service. Due to time tater tots were cooked and temperature observed, food item was moved to refrigeration for proper cold holding. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026
A blender cup was observed in the front hand-washing sink for rinsing. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

Per interview of staff, the blender cup is only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. PIC is to ensure food contact surfaces of in-use equipment are properly washed/rinsed/sanitized at least every 4 hours. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of bio-film. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023
